response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in routing, navigation, or distributed data pipelines — key requirements for the role. His DLang and Node.js background shows systems-level capability, but the absence of proven expertise in routing tile generation, real-time traffic integration, or fault-tolerant geospatial data systems raises significant gaps.
strengths: Built open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) with real-world usage
Demonstrated systems-level programming with DLang and low-latency applications
Strong track record in testing, CI/CD, and dev-ops infrastructure
concerns: No demonstrated experience with C++ or Rust in commercial routing or navigation systems
Lacks evidence of working with routing tile pipelines or geospatial data optimization
Minimal mention of distributed systems concepts like consistency or service discovery
